ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "tested" INTEGER /* Number of people tested for COVID-19 */,
  "infected" INTEGER /* Number of people infected with COVID-19 */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of people who have recovered from COVID-19 */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of people currently hospitalized */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available in the state */,
  "icu_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators in use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "pop_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "gini" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the state */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "gdp" INTEGER /* GDP of the state */,
  "unemployment" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "sex_ratio" REAL /* Sex ratio of the state */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate of the state */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "race_white" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "race_black" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black */,
  "race_asian" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Asian */,
  "race_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "race_other" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is of other races */,
  "health_insurance_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with health insurance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare" (
  "healthcare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "physicians" INTEGER /* Number of physicians in the state */,
  "hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the state */,
  "health_spending" REAL /* Healthcare spending in the state */,
  "nurses" INTEGER /* Number of nurses in the state */,
  "pharmacists" INTEGER /* Number of pharmacists in the state */,
  "pharmacies" INTEGER /* Number of pharmacies in the state */,
  "hospitals_per_100k" REAL /* Number of hospitals per 100,000 population */,
  "physicians_per_100k" REAL /* Number of physicians per 100,000 population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the healthcare data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the healthcare data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthcare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "pollution" REAL /* Pollution level in the state */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in the state */,
  "urban" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the state */,
  "water_quality" REAL /* Average water quality index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Average air quality index */,
  "green_space" REAL /* Percentage of the state that is green space */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environmental data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environmental data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "age_0_17" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 0-17 */,
  "age_18_25" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 18-25 */,
  "age_26_44" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 26-44 */,
  "age_45_64" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 45-64 */,
  "age_65_plus" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 65 and above */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age distribution data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age distribution data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_closure" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school closure data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date of school closure due to COVID-19 */,
  "reopening_date" TEXT /* Date when schools are scheduled to reopen */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for school closure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school closure data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school closure data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_closure_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
